# Internal Tooling Template

```markdown
## Summary
> One-line description of the tool or improvement

## Request Type
- [ ] New internal tool
- [ ] Enhancement to existing tool
- [ ] Automation of manual process

## Problem Statement
> What pain point does this solve? Include:
> - Who is affected (team/role)
> - Current workflow and its problems
> - Frequency of the pain (daily, weekly, per release, etc.)

## Impact
> Quantify where possible. Examples: time savings, error reduction, risk mitigation, developer experience, operational efficiency, cost savings.
-
-
-

## User Stories

<details><summary>As a [role], I want to [action] so that [benefit]</summary>

**User Requirements**
- [ ] User can [specific action]
- [ ] User sees [specific feedback/state]

**System Requirements**
- [ ] System [validates/processes/stores something]
- [ ] System [triggers backend action]
</details>

<details><summary>⚙️ [SYS] As a [role], I want to [action] so that [benefit]</summary>

**System Requirements**
- [ ] System [validates/processes/stores something]
- [ ] System [triggers backend action]
</details>

## Technical Context
> Relevant systems, APIs, or infrastructure this interacts with

## Proposed Approach
> If you have ideas on implementation (optional - eng may propose alternatives)

## Success Criteria
> How do we know this is working?
- [ ] Measurable outcome 1
- [ ] Measurable outcome 2

## Stakeholders
- Requester:
- Engineering owner:
- Other affected teams:
```
